## ThetaDataDx 9.0.2

Property-based test coverage on five hot paths. Pure dev-dependency
addition (`proptest = "1.5"`) — no public-API surface change.

### Added

- **FIE codec**: encoder/decoder round-trip across the full FIE alphabet
  (excluding the terminator nibble `'n'`), strict-vs-panicking-encoder
  agreement, per-character nibble round-trip.
- **FIT codec**: single-row FIT round-trip via a test-only encoder
  against the reader, bulk-decode agreement on the same byte stream, and
  non-negative-monotonicity on partial digit runs.
- **Black-Scholes Greeks**: invariants over the market range
  `(spot, strike) in [0.01, 10000.0]`, `rate in [-0.05, 0.20]`,
  `div_yield in [0.0, 0.10]`, `tte in [1/365, 5.0]`, `iv in [0.001, 5.0]`
  — put-call parity (with tolerance scaled to the normal-CDF
  approximation error), call/put delta bounds, vega non-negativity,
  gamma non-negativity.
- **Time math**: epoch-day monotonicity over `1970..=2099`, the Eastern
  offset returns exactly EST or EDT for every timestamp in
  `2000..=2099`, and DST cutover sanity at spring-forward / fall-back
  boundaries across `1990..=2099` (covers both pre- and post-2007 DST
  rule windows).
- **Contract codec + OCC-21**: `Contract -> to_bytes -> from_bytes`
  round-trip for stocks and options (expiration `2000..=2099`, strike
  `1..=99_999_999`, right `{C, P}`, root 1..=6 ASCII uppercase), OCC-21
  parser round-trip, and composite `OCC-21 -> Contract -> bytes`
  round-trip pinning the parser and wire codec against each other.

### Verification

Reviewed by an external multi-model audit — no findings against the
property-test additions.
